Motion For Reconsideration Of Ruling On Petition For Authority To Terminate Trust And Distribute Assets [Civ. Proc. Code 1008]
Off Calendar Dec-02-2015 Denied

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Oct-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Byrne in Propria Persona.

Mr. Byrne reported that the decedent Irene Denucci was the sole surviving daughter, that she was the only child of Jenny Tsirolias, that the income from Safeway was late, that they used $9000.00 to open a trust for Irene and used money to pay for the funeral with about $200.00 remaining, that subsequently rent was accumulating in the estate, that there is 41 years left on the lease, that the assets need to go into the daughters trust, that the court has the power to get the assets where they need to go, that Irene had two daughters who are the beneficiaries, that the family home is sitting there, that one daughter was trying to buy the other out, that they want the trust terminated and into the estate and referenced the 1998 order, that whether adjudication is to be made in Iren's trust and estate the assets need to go into the trust and that if the court wants the Irene Denucci trust under court supervision they will need a future date for an accounting. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Apr-24-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Byrne in Propria Persona.

Mr. Byrne stated that he stepped in to assist Mr. O'Keeffe in late December, that he did a lot of the leg work at the direction of Mr. O'Keeffe and that Mr. O'Keeffe agreed with the $700.00 amount. The Court directed Mr. Byrne to file a copy of the trust. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
